title: fix: match Websim shell width to Playground
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Changes Websim app shell from max-w-6xl to max-w-5xl.
- Matches the Playground app container width while keeping the same centered shell behavior.

Checks:
- npx biome check --write apps/websim/src/App.tsx
- npm run build --prefix apps/websim

gist.headline: Perfectly Proportioned
gist.blurb: We've tucked in the Websim app shell to match the Playground's width. Everything feels just a little more cohesive now.
gist.summary: Updated the Websim app shell maximum width from 6xl to 5xl to perfectly match the Playground container.
gist.impact: Users will notice a slightly narrower, more consistent layout when switching between the Websim app and the Playground.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a tailor or carpenter, adjusting the width of a glowing digital window to match another one, using a tiny measuring tape.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny tool belt, using a measuring tape to adjust the width of a glowing digital window. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby giving a thumbs up. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
